# Schedge

I think let’s NOT share the schedule with Annie, except meetup and dinner times…right? And maybe brunch time?

**Saturday**  
4:00 pm Meet up at Rosie’s house for celebratory champagne  
5:15 pm Saint Julivert Fisherie  
8 pm \- Bar Bayeaux   
9/9:30 pm \- Head back to Rosie’s  
10 pm \- Chiminea / Annie’s desired bedtime

**Sunday**  
8/9 am \- Brunch

# Breakfast Menu

**Annie’s**  
***“I eat bad days for breakfast”***   
**Birthdart Breakfast**  
---

**Nosh**

This S\*\*t is Bananas  
*Mochi banana pancakes served with maple syrup and fresh berries.*

Eggs On Plate  
*Eggs the way you like ‘em served with homefries and/or uncured local bacon.*

You Oat to Yo(gurt)  
*Yogurt & muesli served with fresh berries.*

**Bevvies**

Beanz A Make Her Dance  
*Coffee.*   
*Brewed strong and bold, just like you.*

Main Squeeze  
*Freshly-squeezed OJ served with a hug.*

Mimosa  
*We listen and we don’t judge.*

**Sweet Treats** 

Cake, Cake, Cake  
*More cake, more better.*

# Gifts

**She hates gifts, but \[[click](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i6lH7cUeaQg&t=5s)\].** 

I plan on getting these things. Let me know if you have any interest in joining forces for these or other gift ideas. 

- [Running socks](http://ppx_yo2ov_dt_b_fed_asin_title)  
  - Already bought, will bring to NYC  
- [Reptile Expo tickets](https://reptileexpo.com/all-shows/white-plains-expo/) \- Sun, April 12, 9 am-4 pm  
  - Could go with or without B\&T – kids under 6 are free\!

# Groceries \- Rosie

I have glutinous rice flour and will grab the other groceries listed on my tab. Let me know if I can grab anything else\!

* GF flour  
* GF muesli  
* Fresh-squeezed OJ  
* Fresh berries (Upick2: raspberries, blueberries, strawberries, snozberries)  
* 1/2 dozen eggs  
* A few Russet potatoes  
* 1 green pepper (for homefries)  
* Plain greek yogurt  
* Cheetos   
* GF Oreos  
* White cheddar popcorn/crunchy salty snack  
* Peanut butter M\&Ms 

# Groceries \- Amelia

* Prosecco & brut champagne  
* 2 ripe bananas  
* 1 onion  
* Maple syrup  
* Uncured local bacon
